title: craspedia major
intro: Craspedia major, also known as the Billy Buttons or Woolly Heads, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Craspedia major include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to support respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, with some practitioners also using it in aromatherapy applications.
